previous_campaign_summary: Prompt enhancement tools, asset version history, drag-to-folder, smart auto-categorization, quality analysis, batch download, lightbox annotations, shortcut customization, export templates, workspace defaults, deduplication scan, trend indicators, ShortcutHint, dominant color extraction. 18 phases completed, all CI passed.

phases.objective: Component test coverage for new features
phases.scope: Added 54 new tests for usePromptHistory, useAssetVersions, useCustomShortcuts, useAssetQuality, useWorkspaceDefaults, useAssetDeduplication. Total: 103 tests.
phases.user_visible_gain: More reliable codebase with better regression detection
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: 6 new test files covering Campaign 005-006 hooks.

phases.scope: Added service worker for offline caching, useServiceWorker hook, OfflineIndicator component.
phases.user_visible_gain: App works offline after first load
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Service worker caches static assets. Offline indicator shows when offline.

phases.scope: Added SwipeableItem (swipe to delete) and PullToRefresh components with touch gesture support.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Touch gestures with configurable threshold. Pull-to-refresh with spinning indicator.

phases.scope: Added ErrorBoundary class component with retry button and error display. Wrapped main app content.
phases.user_visible_gain: App recovers from errors without full reload
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: ErrorBoundary catches render errors and shows retry button.

phases.scope: Added ARIA labels to SwipeableItem and PullToRefresh, skip-to-content link for keyboard users, aria-live regions for dynamic content.
phases.user_visible_gain: App accessible to users with disabilities
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added skip-to-content, ARIA labels, aria-live regions, aria-hidden for decorative elements.

phases.scope: Added imageCompression utility with canvas-based compression. Auto-compresses images >1MB before upload.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Compresses to 1920x1080 max, 85% quality JPEG. Integrated into GlobalDropZone.

phases.scope: Added HighlightedText component for search result highlighting with yellow background.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: HighlightedText splits text and wraps matches in <mark> tags.

phases.scope: Added SkeletonLoader, SkeletonCard, SkeletonMessage components with pulse animation.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Skeleton components with configurable width/height/lines. Pulse animation.

phases.scope: Added Notion and Obsidian export formats with proper formatting.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Notion format uses blockquotes. Obsidian format has YAML frontmatter with tags.

phases.scope: Added usePerformanceMonitor hook tracking load time, DOM content loaded, first paint, memory usage.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Uses Performance API for navigation timing, paint timing, and memory.

phases.scope: Analyzed bundle: 664KB (gzip 201KB). No unused imports found. Slight increase due to new features in Campaign 007.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Bundle size stable. New features (service worker, offline indicator, etc.) add minimal overhead.

phases.scope: Added useKeyboardNavigation hook with arrow keys, Home/End, Enter/Space, loop support.
phases.user_visible_gain: Power users can navigate without mouse
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Configurable item selector and loop behavior.

phases.scope: Added IndexedDB wrapper with get, set, delete, keys operations.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: IndexedDB wrapper with async API. Can store much larger data than localStorage.

phases.scope: Added useNotificationPreferences hook for per-type notification preferences.
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: 4 notification types: message, image, video, system. Each can be toggled.

phases.scope: Improved dark mode contrast for search highlights, offline indicators, and skip-to-content link.
phases.before_after: Dark mode exists but has inconsistencies
phases.local_validation: 103 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added theme-dark overrides for search-highlight, offline/online indicators, skip-to-content.

phases.scope: Real-time validation, error messages, input sanitization
phases.user_visible_gain: Better input validation and error feedback

phases.scope: Full project review, fix any remaining issues
